name: Short-term Boss Damage
description: Optimizes immediate damage output using current inventory.

name: Long-term Account Damage
description: Optimizes future account scaling and resource efficiency.

name: Balanced Progression
description: Balances immediate damage, future scaling, and resource efficiency.

name: Event Shop Value
description: Prioritizes damage-enabling event purchases, breakpoint unlocks, and currency efficiency.

name: F2P Gem Conservation
description: Protects scarce gems while prioritizing source-backed damage breakpoints.

name: Chapter Push / Steamroll
description: Prioritizes immediate broadly applicable damage for chapter progression without valuing survival-only stats.

name: Clan Shop Planning
description: Prioritizes clan-currency purchases that unlock damage progression and avoids unsupported purchases.

name: Pet / Xeno Progression
description: Prioritizes long-term pet and Xeno damage breakpoints while preserving required copies and cores.

name: Gear / SS / Astral Forge
description: Prioritizes gear, SS gear, core allocation, and astral-forge damage breakpoints.

name: Collectible Set Progression
description: Prioritizes source-backed collectible set damage breakpoints and shard efficiency.
